expertTips.title: The 2-Day Buffer Rule
expertTips.description: Always aim to file at least 2 days before the deadline. Government portals (GSTN/PF) often face heavy traffic and downtime on due dates.

expertTips.title: Penalty Warning
expertTips.description: Late PF/ESI payments attract 12% interest plus damages up to 25%. These are non-deductible expenses in your taxes—affecting your bottom line directly.

expertTips.title: State Nuances
expertTips.description: Professional Tax and LWF dates shift depending on where your office is registered. Maharashtra, Karnataka, and Tamil Nadu have distinct statutory timelines.

startupToolkits.title: Company Registration
startupToolkits.description: Choosing between LLP, Private Limited, or OPC. Understanding the MoA, AoA, and Director identification (DIN) process.

startupToolkits.title: Implementing POSH
startupToolkits.description: How to constitute an Internal Committee (IC), draft your POSH policy, and conduct mandatory employee sensitization.

startupToolkits.title: GST & Indirect Tax
startupToolkits.description: Basics of GST registration, HSN coding, and the importance of timely Input Tax Credit (ITC) reconciliation.
